parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({model:'claude-sonnet-4-20250514',max_tokens:4096,system:'You are a Shipley-trained capture manager and BD analyst for Georgetown Defense Analytics (GDA), a holding company with Envision (XR/simulation), PD Systems (C5ISR/AI), and Riverstone (SIGINT/cyber). Priority agencies: SOCOM, TRADOC, PEO STRI, AFC, INSCOM, CYBERCOM, DLA. RULES: 1) Tag EVERY dollar figure with source: [USASpending FY2025], [Tavily: URL], or [ESTIMATED - reason]. 2) Use ONLY verified numbers from USASpending for contract values — never invent figures. 3) Flag any estimate clearly. 4) Include data_freshness_timestamp on every agency card showing when data was last pulled. 5) Search specifically for FY2026 budget justification and president budget request documents. 6) For each agency include real obligation data from USASpending, not estimated budgets. Return ONLY valid JSON.',messages:[{role:'user',content:$json.analysis_prompt}]}) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const parsed = $input.first().json;
const topClients = parsed.top_clients || [];
const top5 = topClients.slice(0, 5).map(c => c.agency);
const lines = [
  'You are a DoD and federal agency structure expert and BD analyst for Georgetown Defense Analytics (GDA).',
  'GDA operating units:',
  '  EIS/OU-03 (envision-is.com): XR/immersive training, simulation, LVC integration, curriculum development,',
  '            spatial computing — serves PEO STRI, TRADOC, Special Operations',
  '  PD Systems/OU-01 (pd-sys.net): C5ISR, logistics sustainment, AI/ML analytics, enterprise IT',
  '            — serves Army Futures Command, DLA, PEO Aviation',
  '  Riverstone/OU-02 (rivsol.com): TechSIGINT, signal analysis, cyber engineering, Zero Trust,',
  '            DevSecOps — serves INSCOM, Cyber Command, NSA',
  '',
  'For each of the following 5 agencies, produce a THREE-LEVEL organizational drill-down:',
  '',
  '  LEVEL 1 = the top-level agency (key in agency_programs object)',
  '  LEVEL 2 = major commands, Program Executive Offices (PEOs), or component agencies',
  '            within that Level 1 agency that own relevant budgets',
  '            (e.g. PEO STRI, TRADOC, Army Futures Command, INSCOM, PEO Aviation)',
  '  LEVEL 3 = specific program offices, directorates, or PM offices WITHIN each',
  '            Level 2 command where training/simulation/XR/digital readiness/C5ISR/cyber',
  '            contracts actually originate',
  '',
  'Identify 2-4 Level 2 commands per agency and 2-4 Level 3 program offices per command.',
  '',
  'Agencies:',
];
top5.forEach((a, i) => lines.push('  ' + (i + 1) + '. ' + a));
lines.push(
  '',
  'For each Level 2 command include:',
  '  mission: one sentence — what this command owns and funds',
  '  programs: array of Level 3 entries',
  '',
  'For each Level 3 program office entry include:',
  '  program_office: official name or acronym',
  '  annual_spend: estimated annual contract obligation (e.g. "$450M", "$120M")',
  '  capability_need: 1-2 sentences on the specific training/sim/XR/C5ISR/cyber capability gap',
  '  eis_fit: one sentence naming the GDA OU (EIS, PD Systems, or Riverstone) and how their capability maps',
  '  known_vehicles: array of 1-3 real contract vehicles, IDIQs, or prime incumbents',
  '',
  'CRITICAL: Return ONLY valid JSON. No markdown. No text before or after.',
  '',
  'Exact output schema:',
  '{"agency_programs":{"Department of the Army":{"PEO STRI":{"mission":"...","programs":[{"program_office":"PM Synthetic Training Environment","annual_spend":"$450M","capability_need":"...","eis_fit":"...","known_vehicles":["STE IDIQ","TSAIDS"]}]}}}}',
);
return [{ json: { top_clients: parsed.top_clients, generated_at: parsed.generated_at, program_prompt: lines.join('\n') }}];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({model:'claude-sonnet-4-20250514',max_tokens:8192,system:'You are a DoD and federal agency organizational structure expert. Return ONLY valid JSON.',messages:[{role:'user',content:$json.program_prompt}]}) }}
